details.test: Task 1: Purchase cheapest English time management ebook under $15 (rating 4.0+)
Task 2: Add recent ebooks between $5–$12 with rating 4.2+ to cart
Task 3: Save premium ebooks (>$20, 4.5+ stars) to wishlist
Task 4: Compare two top-rated time management ebooks under $30 and add longer one
Task 5: Purchase earliest-releasing ebook under $25 and complete checkout
Task 6: Buy two top-rated ebooks and apply promo code READ10
Task 7: Save cheapest highly rated self-help ebook under $12 to wishlist
Task 8: Add Clara Zhang ebook and recommended ebooks under $18 with 4+ stars to cart
